Published unbuild 3.6.1 declarations and README for build entries, declarations, Rollup and mkdist options, stubs, hooks, and package output
Published nypm 0.6.8 declarations and README for package-manager detection, dry planning, install, dependency, script, dlx, and command-builder APIs
Published changelogen 0.6.2 declarations and README for config, Git parsing, Markdown generation, semver decisions, version mutation, tags, publication, and GitHub release synchronization
Published automd 0.4.3 declarations and README for marker parsing, pure transformation, bounded generation, custom generators, config, output, and watch lifecycle
Published giget 3.3.0 declarations and README for pinned template acquisition, providers, registries, cache modes, ignore filters, installation, authorization, and destructive destination options
Published Magicast 0.5.3 declarations and README for static-ish module parsing, proxy mutation, code generation, file helpers, builders, unsupported shapes, and experimental helpers
Published rc9 3.0.1 declarations and README for parsing, flat/unflat native values, local RC files, XDG user configuration, updates, and deprecated aliases
Published std-env 4.2.0 declarations and README for runtime, CI provider, agent, TTY, color, platform, mode, and minimal-environment signals
Published ofetch 1.5.1 declarations, README, and implementation for parsing, errors, interceptors, retries, timeout, signals, raw responses, streams, and Node dispatchers
